DOMComponentItem.name: Newgrounds.IO/components/Newgrounds.IO Scoreboard Single

DOMTextRun.characters: Error messages will show up here...

DOMComponentItem.parametersAsXML: <property id="board_id"> <Inspectable name="ScoreBoard ID" variable="board_id" category="" verbose="0" defaultValue="0" type="Number"/> </property> <property id="period"> <Inspectable name="Period" variable="period" category="" verbose="0" defaultValue="Today" enumeration="Today,Week,Month,Year,All" type="List"/> </property> <property id="show"> <Inspectable name="Show" variable="show" category="" verbose="0" defaultValue="Everybody" enumeration="My Best,Friends,Everybody" type="List"/> </property> <property id="tag"> <Inspectable name="Tag (optional)" variable="tag" category="" verbose="0" defaultValue="" type="String"/> </property>
